name: The forest
description:
Your a creature in a forest full of these weird and mutant creatures tree like deer foxes the size of bears And many other weird things, there’s three ranks of these creatures. Prey, small creatures normally the size of squirrels maybe a bit bigger or smaller, they are normally herbivores or scavenger and are normally hunted down by the bigger creatures. Modens, These creature can be omnivore or carnivores and very rarely herbivores they are the ones that hunt the prey down and eat them, but even these still have predators. Guardians, these creature can be very small or very big and can eat almost anything and have no predators other than themselves but most stay in groups.

So, now that I have stated the sizes and types you get to pick are you passive or aggressive? Are you small or big? It’s all up to you, but... there’s one more problem, humans, they have can to hunt will the guardians protect there forest will the modens clean up the scraps of there remains and will the prey lead them straight to danger, we may never know... unless you find the fate out yourself..?

I hope I did good 😃👍
creator: Cara._.likes food
